overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City. The player moves from a downtown commercial district with towering megabuildings through an intersection into an industrial zone with smokestacks and factories, featuring golden hour lighting and long shadows.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the towering megabuilding
camera pans left to reveal surrounding buildings and street

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection looking up at the megabuilding architecture, then panning to survey the downtown area

entered.detail: tall futuristic megabuilding with teal structural beams, red vertical accents, and stacked architectural sections
asphalt road with white crosswalk markings and traffic lights
tall palm tree on the sidewalk corner
tower with glowing holographic advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a downtown intersection with a massive teal and red megabuilding dominating the view. The camera looks up at the tower against a bright blue sky, then pans left to reveal the surrounding urban architecture including a curved glass building and elevated highway in the distance.

events.description: moving from open intersection into street beneath elevated highway structure
turning left to follow the sidewalk path alongside the curved building

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street beneath the elevated highway, passing modern architecture and street furniture

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking on the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: modern curved building with teal tinted glass windows and rounded corner architecture
raised concrete highway overpass with support pillars
tall street light with orange fixture and vertical sign

segments.scene_description: The player walks forward beneath an elevated highway structure, passing a distinctive curved glass building on the left. The street is relatively empty with only a few distant pedestrians visible, and the camera turns left to follow the sidewalk path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with concrete barrier and graffiti

events.description: approaching and passing a group of three pedestrians on the sidewalk
crossing the street at the intersection toward the industrial district

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered concrete wall, approaching and passing other pedestrians before crossing the street

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking toward the camera on the narrow sidewalk
dark colored car driving down the street alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall with blue lower section and colorful graffiti art
tall modern building with green reflective glass facade
orange and white striped construction barriers blocking part of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the left, the player passes a group of pedestrians and approaches an intersection. A green glass tower rises on the right while construction barriers narrow the path, before crossing the street toward an industrial area visible in the distance.

events.description: crossing from commercial downtown into industrial zone with visible factory smokestacks
facing directly into bright morning sun causing lens flare and strong backlighting

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and entering the industrial district, moving toward the smokestacks

notable_agents.action: person in light clothing crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: tall factory smokestacks emitting white smoke against the sky
low industrial building with red neon signage reading Electric Corporation
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting two buildings with metal framework

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the intersection into an industrial district characterized by towering smokestacks emitting white smoke. The Electric Corporation building sits on the left with glowing red signage, while an elevated walkway spans the right side. The camera faces directly into the bright morning sun, creating a lens flare effect.

events.description: white van drives past on the street from right to left
passing by industrial warehouse with neon signs and entering more densely industrial area

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial sidewalk past factory buildings and smokestacks, observing the gritty urban environment

notable_agents.action: person with red hair walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction
white van driving past on the road moving away from the camera

entered.detail: long low industrial building with green roof and red neon signage
crisscrossing electrical wires and cables overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking through the industrial district, the player passes a long warehouse building with neon signs on the right while smokestacks continue to dominate the left horizon. A white van drives past on the street, and overhead power lines crisscross the sky. The environment shows gritty urban decay with graffiti and industrial infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a towering downtown commercial district into a gritty, sun-drenched industrial zone. It begins at a busy intersection looking up at a massive teal and red megabuilding against a bright blue sky, before panning left to take in the surrounding urban architecture and an elevated highway. As the camera moves forward beneath the highway structure and past a curved glass building, the path narrows along a graffiti-covered concrete wall and through construction barriers toward a distant industrial horizon. The scene then opens into a district of towering smokestacks and the red signage of the Electric Corporation building, where the camera faces directly into the bright morning sun to create a vivid lens flare. Finally, the movement continues past long warehouses and neon signs under a web of crisscrossing power lines, transitioning fully into an environment of urban decay and industrial infrastructure.
